title: Tragacantha sciadophora
taxonomy: Tragacantha sciadophora is a species of plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is a type of shrub or small tree that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species is classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae, which is one of the largest and most diverse groups within the family Fabaceae. Within the subfamily Faboideae, Tragacantha sciadophora is further classified as a member of the tribe Dalbergieae. Further classification of the species is still a subject of ongoing research and taxonomic revisions.
